title: IRCTC Tourism is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: IRCTC Tourism is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
IRCTC Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Raipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IRCTC Tourism:
IRCTC Tourism is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IRCTC Tourism!
